system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_baogia2_son_create","body":"CREATE PROC TR_BAOGIA2_SON_CREATE(@masp nvarchar(100), @baoGiaID uniqueidentifier)
AS

DECLARE @dai float
DECLARE @rong float
DECLARE @cao float

SELECT @dai = dai, @rong = rong, @cao = cao FROM tr_sanpham WHERE masp = @masp

IF @dai IS NULL
  SET @dai = 0
IF @rong IS NULL
  SET @rong = 0
IF @cao IS NULL
  SET @cao = 0
  
DECLARE @dongia_son float
SELECT @dongia_son = SUM(A.sl_m2 * B.dongia)
FROM tr_dinhmuc_son A
  INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mact = B.mavt
WHERE A.masp = @masp

IF @dongia_son IS NULL
  SET @dongia_son = 0
  
DECLARE @MATSON TABLE
(
  stt INT,
  cumson    NVARCHAR (200),
  tencum       NVARCHAR (200),
  mamatson      NVARCHAR (20),
  matson    NVARCHAR (200),
  kichthuoc nvarchar(100),
  dientich float
)

INSERT INTO @MATSON (stt,cumson,tencum,mamatson,matson, kichthuoc, dientich)
VALUES (1,'dinh',N'Đình','dinh_matngoai',N'Mặt ngoài', CONCAT(@dai, '*', @rong), @dai*@rong/1000000),
       (2,'dinh',N'Đình','dinh_mattrong',N'Mặt trong', CONCAT(@dai, '*', @rong), @dai*@rong/1000000),
     
       (3,'hongtrai',N'Hông trái','hongtrai_matngoai',N'Mặt ngoài', CONCAT(@rong, '*', @cao), @rong*@cao/1000000),
       (4,'hongtrai',N'Hông trái','hongtrai_mattrong',N'Mặt trong', CONCAT(@rong, '*', @cao), @rong*@cao/1000000),
       
       (5,'hongphai',N'Hông phải','hongphai_matngoai',N'Mặt ngoài', CONCAT(@rong, '*', @cao), @rong*@cao/1000000),
       (6,'hongphai',N'Hông phải','hongphai_mattrong',N'Mặt trong', CONCAT(@rong, '*', @cao), @rong*@cao/1000000),
    
       (7,'day',N'Đáy','day_matngoai',N'Mặt ngoài', CONCAT(@dai, '*', @rong), @dai*@rong/1000000),
       (8,'day',N'Đáy','day_mattrong',N'Mặt trong', CONCAT(@dai, '*', @rong), @dai*@rong/1000000),
    
       (9,'mattruoc',N'Mặt trước','truoc_matngoai',N'Mặt ngoài', CONCAT(@cao, '*', @dai), @cao*@dai/1000000),
       (10,'mattruoc',N'Mặt trước','truoc_mattrong',N'Mặt trong', CONCAT(@cao, '*', @dai), @cao*@dai/1000000),
    
       (11,'matsau',N'Mặt sau','sau_matngoai',N'Mặt ngoài', CONCAT(@cao, '*', @dai), @cao*@dai/1000000),
       (12,'matsau',N'Mặt sau','sau_mattrong',N'Mặt trong', CONCAT(@cao, '*', @dai), @cao*@dai/1000000)
       
INSERT INTO tr_baogia2_son(baoGiaID, masp, matson, cumson, kichthuoc, dientich, phantram_son, dongia)
SELECT @baoGiaID, @masp, mamatson, cumson, kichthuoc, dientich, 100, @dongia_son
FROM @MATSON","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_baogia2_son"],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
